CVE-2021-24032.title: Beginning in v1.4.1 and prior to v1.4.9, due to an incomplete fix ...
CVE-2021-24032.description: Beginning in v1.4.1 and prior to v1.4.9, due to an incomplete fix for CVE-2021-24031, the Zstandard command-line utility created output files with default permissions and restricted those permissions immediately afterwards. Output files could therefore momentarily be readable or writable to unintended parties.

CVE-2022-4899.title: A vulnerability was found in zstd v1.4.10, where an attacker can  ...
CVE-2022-4899.description: A vulnerability was found in zstd v1.4.10, where an attacker can supply empty string as an argument to the command line tool to cause buffer overrun.
